markdown:
# Crafter

You gain the following benefits.

## Tool Proficiency

You gain proficiency with three different [[artisan_s_tools's Tools]] of your choice from the Fast Crafting table.

## Discount

Whenever you buy a nonmagical item, you receive a 20 percent discount on it.

## Fast Crafting

When you finish a [[long_rest Rest]], you can craft one piece of gear from the Fast Crafting table, provided you have the [[artisan_s_tools's Tools]] associated with that item and have proficiency with those tools. The item lasts until you finish another [[long_rest Rest]], at which point the item falls apart.

**Fast Crafting**

| Artisan's Tools | Crafted Gear |
| --- | --- |
| [[carpenter_s_tools's Tools]] | [[ladder]], [[torch]] |
| [[leatherworker_s_tools's Tools]] | [[crossbow_bolt_case Bolt Case]], [[map_or_scroll_case or Scroll Case]], [[pouch]] |
| [[mason_s_tools's Tools]] | [[block_and_tackle and Tackle]] |
| [[potter_s_tools's Tools]] | [[jug]], [[lamp]] |
| [[smith_s_tools's Tools]] | [[ball_bearings Bearings]], [[bucket]], [[caltrops]], [[grappling_hook Hook]], [[iron_pot Pot]] |
| [[tinker_s_tools's Tools]] | [[bell]], [[shovel]], [[tinderbox]] |
| [[weaver_s_tools's Tools]] | [[basket]], [[rope]], [[net]], [[tent]] |
| [[woodcarver_s_tools's Tools]] | [[club]], [[greatclub]], [[quarterstaff]] |
